name: Coffee Mocha Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the chilled coffee into a punch bowl.
2. Add walnut-sized chunks of chocolate ice cream and vanilla ice cream.
3. Whip the cream with salt, sugar, almond extract, and vanilla until soft peaks form.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream into the punch mixture.
5. Sprinkle nutmeg (and optional cinnamon) over each serving.
Per serving: 82 calories (5% from protein, 42% from carbohydrate, 53% from fat), 1 gram protein, 9 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams fat, 19 milligrams cholesterol, 37 milligrams sodium.
Exchanges: 1/2 bread, 1 fat.
Makes 10 servings.
